fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Found in Clockify -> Profile Settings -> API

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via Clockify /user endpoint

metadata.summary: Clockify time tracking for teams with projects, reports, and timesheets.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to Clockify at app.clockify.me
2. Click your profile avatar (top right) -> Profile settings
3. Scroll to the API section at the bottom
4. Click 'Generate' to create a new API key
5. Copy the key and paste it here
